## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Verified in browser at `http://localhost:3000`
- [ ] `prefers-reduced-motion` respected (if motion-related)
- [ ] WCAG 2.1 AA: keyboard nav, focus visible, alt text (if UI-related)
- [ ] JSON-LD still valid (if touching business data or metadata)
- [ ] Perf: LCP / CLS / INP within budget (if motion or 3D)
